description_long: This is a single slip-on athletic shoe featuring a low-cut design and a rounded toe. The upper is constructed from a mesh-like fabric with a faded, multicolored pattern dominated by light gray, green, and hints of pink and yellow. The shoe has a thick, white textured sole with a slightly raised heel and a black rubberized toe cap and heel guard for added durability. There is a pull tab at the heel for easy wearing, and the collar is padded for comfort. The shoe shows visible signs of wear, with some discoloration and creasing on the upper fabric and scuffing on the sole.
description: A slip-on athletic shoe with a multicolored mesh upper, thick white sole, and black toe and heel guards. The shoe shows signs of wear and has a padded collar and heel pull tab.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the heel pull tab, padded collar, and the textured white sole wrapping around the back.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the faded multicolored mesh upper, black trim, and the full length of the thick white sole.
description_view_2: Front three-quarter view displaying the rounded toe, black toe guard, and the worn, patterned upper fabric.
description_view_3: Profile view of the shoe's outer side, showing the slip-on design, mesh upper, and the sole's thickness.
